title: MKS Tech
description: The mod was created using MCreator. MKS tech this is a mod that adds electronics to our favorite Minecraft, some of them have functionality.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rSCaRZtH/images/3714851fd3051818ffaf0ddc5983d8c437e8a1f7.png) The mod was created using MCreator. # Description MKS tech this is a mod that adds electronics to our favorite Minecraft, some of them have functionality. In current versions of the mod, the functionality of smartphones and other equipment is not yet very extensive. Their functionality will be expanded as possible. If you liked the description of this mod, you can download it and try it out.
### Smartphone GUI
![Smartphone GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rSCaRZtH/images/05d2ac1a598957780935793b79f082257041cf66.png)
### Gaming laptop
![Gaming laptop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rSCaRZtH/images/c96908a1e8f128c65313254658378921aba90b33.png)
# List of tasks |App|Stage|Item|Stage| |-|:-:|-|:-:| |Music|Done|Headphones|Done| |Weather|Done|Tablet|Done| |Clock|Beta|Smartphone|Beta| |Messenger|Beta|Laptops|Beta| |Videoplayer|Alpha|Smart watch|Done| |Settings|Alpha|Robot Vacuum Cleaner|Done| |Camera|In tasks|Keyboard|Done| |Gallery|In tasks|Gaming monitor|Done| # PC components Components for crafting a PC (PC without functionality) |Component|Stage| |-|:-:| |Motherboard|Done| |Processor|Done| |Videocard|Done| |RAM|Done| |HDD|Done| |PC case|Done| |Power supply|Done| |SSD|In tasks|

![mks_tech_wiki](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rSCaRZtH/images/5dea5d4028920e35cf529f427a020d29d03292c8.png)

You can open the mod wiki in the menu on the left or [via the link](https://mks-mods.tilda.ws/mks-tech/wiki-home)
